memos.title: New Dual G5 AI/HSI Promotion — Save Over $600 Through June 15
memos.summary: Garmin announces a new promotional Dual G5 Kit (Part K10-00280-51) combining attitude indicator and horizontal situation indicator functions in a single package with all installation accessories included. The kit lists at $6,995 and offers over $600 in savings compared to purchasing components individually. Includes GMU 11 magnetometer, GAD 13 adapter, GAD 29D adapter, GPS antenna, and complete connector kits. This limited-time promotional pricing is available now through June 15, 2026. Contact RWAS for installed pricing and scheduling.

memos.title: Spring 2026 Garmin Dealer Pricing Update
memos.summary: Garmin has released updated dealer pricing for the Spring 2026 season across the G3X Touch, GTN Xi series, and GFC 500 autopilot product lines. Pricing reflects modest adjustments from the 2025 schedule. Contact RWAS for current installed pricing on all configurations.

products.name: G3X Touch Suite
products.description: Full glass cockpit upgrade with integrated ADAHRS, EIS, and synthetic vision. STCd for most single-engine piston aircraft including Cessna 172/182, Piper PA-28 series, and Beechcraft Bonanza.

products.name: GTN 650Xi
products.description: Compact GPS/NAV/COMM navigator with WAAS LPV approach capability. Touchscreen interface with full IFR certification and wireless database updates via Connext.
stc_aircraft: Most GA singles and light twins

products.name: GTN 750Xi
products.description: Full-featured GPS/NAV/COMM with 6.9-inch touchscreen display. Flight plan integration, WAAS LPV, and optional remote audio panel control.
stc_aircraft: Most GA singles and light twins

products.name: GFC 500 Autopilot
products.description: Digital retrofit autopilot with GPSS steering, altitude hold, vertical speed modes, and optional yaw damper. Integrates with G3X Touch and GTN Xi navigators for coupled approaches.

products.name: GNX 375
products.description: All-in-one ADS-B transponder with built-in WAAS GPS, providing ADS-B Out compliance and ADS-B In weather and traffic on compatible displays.
